hero.title: Governance tan repository ya modelo
hero.lead: Pansiansiaen na IATF ya publiko, nabasa, tan mainomay ya pansiansiaen iray proyekto nipaakar ed aksesibilidad.
support: Ipaliwawa na sayan pahina no anto ray kualipikado, no panon ya aasikasoen iray repository, tan no anton responsabilidad so onaplika ed level na repositories kayari na pangawat.

cards.title: Matukoy ed Misyon
paragraphs: Awaten na IATF so kimey ya ontutukoy ed peteg ya babeng ed iyaplika tan walaan na malinew a balor ed publiko.
Say sakey a proyekto et nepeg ya aliwan sakey labat a personal ya workflow tan nayarin usaren bilang public repository.

Parad Web accessibility, uusaren na IATF [W3C WAI](https://www.w3.org/WAI/) Say direktan eksperiensya na saray manguusar na ontulong iran teknolohiya so praktikal met ya ebidensya no anto so epektibo ed peteg ya panguusar.

cards.title: Pangipaakseb ed proyekto
paragraphs: Nayari ya awaten so sakey a proposal sano nanengneng ed impan-review ya:
items: ontutukoy itan ed peteg a pankaukolan ed inkapanginawaan
realistikon maong so scope pian ni-launch
say kimey et mitunosan ed misyon na IATF
walay posiblin dalan parad maintenance odino completion

cards.title: Say pakauley ed repository
paragraphs: Saray naaprobaan a proyekto et ginawa ed silong na IATF GitHub organization.
Saray repository so mansiansia diman pian napansiansia na kada proyekto so malet a pampublikon ayaman, anggano say manag-asikaso so manguman ed saginonor.

cards.title: Panangiter na Lisensia
paragraphs: Uusaren na saray proyekto na IATF so copyleft a lisensia likud no arum so imbaga na sakey a proyekto:

maintainer.title: Responsable ya inhenyero odino managmintina
paragraphs: Kada naaprobaan a proyekto et nepeg a walay ngaran na responsablin inhenyero odino managmintina. Nayarin naawat na satan a too so access na admin ed repository tan iilaloan ton:
items: re-review or manage issues and pull requests (repaso o pangasikaso ed saray isyu tan pull request)
idokumento iray importantin desisyon ed teknikal
pian natalosan na arum so proyekto
maintainer.footnote: Saya so responsibilidad na repository-level. Say organizational ownership so mansiansia ed IATF. Say responsibilidad dia et say panag-asikaso na repositories, teknikal ya direksion, tan pampublikon koordinasyon  aliwan say anggapoy limitasyon ya private delivery, custom integrations, odino service-level commitments ya walad paway na public roadmap.

publicDevelopment.title: Panagpaaligwas ed Publiko
paragraphs: Saray proyekto ya inlunsad panamegley na IATF et i-develop ed publiko bilang default. Say repository so publikon lapuan na katuaan parad:
publicDevelopment.footnote: Say importantin pikakabat ed proyekto so agnepeg a manayam labat ed saray pribadon chat odino inbox.

paragraphs: Saray kerew ya onloob ed IATF panamegley na website, e-mail, Discord, GitHub, odino arum ni ran channel et nayarin magmaliw ya publikon rekord na kerew.

Say publikon rekord na kerew et aliwan say orihinal ya mensahe. Nayarin sumaryoen, i-edit, odino i-restructure na IATF so kerew antis ya i-publish pian na-review so access ya kaukolan ya ag-ipaparungtal so agnakaukolan ya personal ya impormasyon.
Saray publikon rekord na kerew et nayarin na-store ed IATF GitHub organization, diad sayan website, odino ed parehon lugar.

Antis na pangipalapag, ekalen na IATF iray agnakaukolan a personal a detalye na kontak, pribadon adres, tan saray detalyadon pakabidbiran ed saray indibidual a manguusar na ontulong iran teknolohiya likud no malinew tan matukoy so gagala na pangipapalapag.

Say Discord et uusaren parad aliwan pormal ya koordinasyon. Say IATF et agman-archive na saray pantotongtongan na Discord diad default, tan say panag-ipreserba na mensahe et kokontrolen na Diskord. Saray desisyon ya ginawa ed Discord so nepeg ya isumaryo ed publikon rekord diad GitHub odino diad mismon pahina na proyekto.

Saray rekord na kerew so naekal ed indexing na search engine no praktikal ed teknikal. Public so mankabaliksan na reviewable tan accountable. Agto labay ya ibaga ya na-optimize pian naromog panamegley na panaanap na ngaran.

Sarag na IATF ya i-update odino ekalen iray rekord ed saray publikon lugar ya kokontrolen na satan, balet agto garantiyaen ya ekalen iratan ed third-party caches, notifications, forks, screenshots, search engines, Discord, odino arum nin system.
No kaukolan ya mansiansian pribado so mensahe, agmo itan ipapawit panamegley na saray publikon channel na IATF.

chair.lead: Say chair so walaan na organisasyon-level stewardship na IATF. Duma iya ed say per-project responsible engineer role: say chair so responsabli ed organisasyon bilang interon, aliwan ed inagew-agew ya direksion na anggan anton repository.

duties.title: No antoy gagawaen na yurongan
items: Mangiyagel ed saray permiso na akankayarian ed IATF GitHub ya organisasyon
Pangipaakseb ed saray desisyon nipaakar ed pangawat na proyekto tan pangarchive
Aktibo bilang public contact point parad IATF
duties.footnote: Say chairman et agmangikokonekta ed IATF ed saray pribadon pangitarya, babayaran a kimey, odino saray paknaan ed service-level, tan agmanguuman ed kada desisyon na maintainer na repository nipaakar ed teknikal a direksion.

election.title: Tinaon ya eleksion
paragraphs: Say tsirman so pipilien a maminsan ed sakey taon. Say eleksion so nagawa ed unonan duaran simba na Disyembre, saray resulta so ipaamta ed Disyembre 15, tan say balon termino so onggapo ed Enero 1.

Saray makanepegan ya botante et saray totoo ya walay betang dan maintainer ed anggan dinan ya IATF repository ed loob na sakey taon tan nanggawa na ag-onkulang ed sakey ya inmerged ya kontribusyon ed sakey a repositoryo na Iatf ed satan ya taon. Kada sakey ya makanepekan ya voter et walay sakey ya boto. Say kandidato ya walaan na mas dakel ya boto so manalo; no walay parepareho, walay round-off ya nagawa ed komatlon simba na Disyembre.
Say eleksion et gagawaen bilang publikon Diskusyon ed GitHub diad tinuro ya IATF governance repository, kanian saray kandidato, say boto, tan say resulta et kabiangan na publikon rekord.

continuity.title: Kankontinuidad
paragraphs: No anggapo so eleksion ed sakey a taon, say manunan pangulo so mantultuloy ed betang to ya anggad onsublay ya eleksion. Saya so andi-anggaan ya intuloy, aliwan panaon na gracia  say modelo so denesinyo pian pansiansiaen so organisasyon a maligen sano abebbeba so aktibidad, aliwan pian piliten so sakey a transisyon ya anggapo so akaparaan.

Nayarin onekal so tsirman ed anggan anton panaon.Saray aktibon mantentor so nayarin mangimbita met na ekstraordinaryo iran eleksion tekep na indatak a rason, a nagawa unong ed parehon totontonen a singa say tinaon ya eleksion.

chair.footnote: Say betang na chairman so inpormal nen 2026 pian ipaliwawa so panangasikaso ed organisasyon. Anggad saman, say responsibilidad ed organisasyon so aliwan pormal a susuportaan na manangipalapag.

states.title: Saray kipapasen na proyekto
paragraphs: Saray proyekto so manguusar na melag a grupo na saray publikon estado:
states.footnote: Sarayan estado so mamainomay ed pan-scan ed rehistro.

reassignment.title: Pangipawil tan pangi-archive
paragraphs: No onarawi so sakey a manag-mintina odino agla aktibo, say IATF so nayarin mangiter na responsabilidad, manpa-pause ed panag-develop, odino man-archive ed proyekto.
Nayari met ya i-archive so sakey a proyekto sano asumpal la so orihinal a pankaukolan, tinmunda lay panagmintina, odino agla realistikon ituloy so kimey.
reassignment.footnote: Saray aka-archive a proyekto so mansiansian nanengneng na publiko likud no wala so makanepegan a rason pian ag-itan nagawaan.

items: pangasikasod mabayag a panaon parad kada proyekto
boundaries.footnote: Say IATF et public repository model, aliwan private delivery service.
